title: Rustins Damp Seal Paint – Water-Resistant Primer for Walls and Ceilings, Effectively Seals Damp Stains, Quick-Drying and Easy to Apply for Long-Lasting Results500ml
features: Effectively Seals and Prevents Damp Stains – Rustins Damp Seal provides a powerful solution for walls and ceilings, forming a tough barrier to prevent damp patches from reappearing
Quick-Drying and Easy Application Formula – Designed for efficiency, this damp seal dries rapidly and can be applied with minimal effort, saving you time while delivering outstanding results
Reliable for Multiple Indoor Surfaces – Perfect for use on plaster, concrete, and brick, this versatile product helps protect against recurring moisture issues. ADD TO BASKET now
Water-Resistant Barrier for Long-Lasting Protection – Creates a durable and effective seal to stop dampness from spreading, keeping your surfaces dry and stain-free over time
Optimal Coverage with Minimal Coats Needed – Rustins Damp Seal provides great surface coverage, often requiring fewer coats compared to other products, ensuring cost-effectiveness and convenience.
